title: Rexzon_Tpack (Revaped)
description: Maximize your FPS and dominate PvP. Features a custom shield cooldown animation, animated Golden Apples, Pearls, Wind Bursts, and Crossbows,plus small handheld textures for maximum field ofview.Credits:The credits are gone to packsmc.com this is revamp
body:
## Rexzon_Tpack: Enhanced PvP and Performance Boost

Welcome to Rexzon_Tpack, a texture pack focused on performance and competitive PvP clarity. This pack is designed to optimize game performance and clear up screen real estate, giving you a cleaner view during intense combat situations.

This project is built using a modified base from packmc.com. The original base has been significantly edited, with numerous custom textures, model scaling tweaks, and animations added to improve the overall gameplay experience.

### Core Features and Optimizations

* Performance Optimization: Built with lightweight and streamlined textures intended to lower memory usage, helping to stabilize and boost your frames-per-second (FPS).
* Visible Shield Cooldown: Features a clear, easily readable cooldown animation directly on the shield texture so you always know precisely when your defense is ready.
* Compact Item Models: The Golden Apple and Mace (including Wind Burst effects) have been scaled down. They take up significantly less screen space when held, greatly improving your field of view (FOV).
* Custom Weapon Textures: Unique, completely redesigned textures for Swords and Axes to give your main weapons a distinct and sharp look.
* Animated Item Textures: Includes custom animations for the Golden Apple to make your hotbar feel more dynamic.

### Credits and Compliance

* Base Asset Credit: This pack utilizes assets from packmc.com as a foundation. These files have been heavily modified, re-textured, and expanded with original work.
* Compatibility: Optimized for modern versions of Minecraft Java Edition. For the best performance results, it is recommended to use this pack alongside optimization mods like Sodium or OptiFine.
*
